name: price-monitor
title: Price Monitor — Track Amazon, eBay, Shopify & Get Drop Alerts
description: Monitor product prices across Amazon, eBay, AliExpress, Shopify, and any e-commerce store. Get price history, drop alerts, and all-time-low detection via Proxies.sx mobile proxies.

params.targetPrice: number (optional) — Alert when price drops to this

body.urls: Array<{url, name?, targetPrice?}> — List of products to check

features: Multi-store support (Amazon, eBay, AliExpress, Shopify, + generic)
JSON-LD + regex hybrid extraction for reliability
Proxy exit IP in response metadata
Batch price checking with alert generation

proof.description: Run 10 scrapes against a known product, verify proxy IPs rotate and prices are consistent
